allowed_tools.name: file_read_scoped
allowed_tools.description: Reads text files located strictly inside the quant_workspace directory.

allowed_tools.name: grep_limited
allowed_tools.description: Searches for matching strings limited to 50 results in a specified file.

allowed_tools.name: run_targeted_tests
allowed_tools.description: Runs targeted unit tests via pytest on a single test file.

allowed_tools.name: risk_summary
allowed_tools.description: Fetches safe summary metrics from CSurvivalScoreEngine.

allowed_tools.name: compile_check
allowed_tools.description: Performs compiler syntax validation via metaeditor64.
